title: cenchrus prolificus
intro: Cenchrus prolificus, also known as Proso millet or Cheena, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and indigestion. The health benefits of Cenchrus prolificus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant is often prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
